programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Lana Del Rey - Live in London 2012
programme.desc: Born to Die is the second album by singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, and the first to be officially released on January 27, 2012 and that would lead to global success; In countries such as the United Kingdom the album was the best selling of that year.

programme.title: James Taylor - Austin City Limits
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas; the festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Imagine Dragons - Live At The Moody Theater
programme.desc: Filmed at The Moody Theater, Texas, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Classic Imagine Dragons featuring unforgettable version of their hits: 'Demons', 'Radioactive' and many more.

programme.title: Britney Spears - Live from London
programme.desc: Filmed at Roundhouse, London, this concert film will give all fans a spectacular Live experience from start to finish. Britney Spears performs her hits including Baby One More Time, Oops! I Did It Again, Toxic and many more.

programme.title: Justin Bieber - Live at Madison Square Garden
programme.desc: The film follows the pop star Justin Bieber during 10 days counting down to his performance at Madison Square Garden.

programme.title: Jessie J - Live in London 2014
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Lady Gaga -- Live in London 2013
programme.desc: Lady Gaga's performance at the iTunes Festival in London on Sept. 1, 2013 marks her first full concert since the Born This Way Ball.

programme.title: Jack White - Live at iTunes Festival
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Paul McCartney - The Space Within US
programme.desc: Paul McCartney presents this special performance of the US Tour, made in the United States, 11 weeks and 34 shows, playing great compositions of his solo career along with some Wings and Beatles songs.

programme.title: Stingray Djazz
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ is a deep dive into jazz without boundaries, offering a selection of concerts, major festival performances, rare documentaries, intimate portraits, and behind-the-scenes footage of artists from around the world.

programme.title: It's Showtime at the Apollo
programme.desc: It's Showtime at the Apollo is a syndicated music television show, first broadcast on September 12, 1987. The show features live performances from both professional and up-and-coming artists, and also features the Amateur Night competition.

programme.title: It's Showtime at the Apollo
programme.desc: It's Showtime at the Apollo is a syndicated music television show, first broadcast on September 12, 1987. The show features live performances from both professional and up-and-coming artists, and also features the Amateur Night competition.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Symba, a rapper from The Bay Area, tells his life story and how he ultimately landed a deal with Atlantic Records and his first national tour.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: This episode focuses on Big Boss Vette, a rapper from St. Louis. It depicts Vette's life of trials and tribulations, hitting rock bottom and bouncing back to sky high success.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: The third episode tells the story of known battle rapper, Hitman Holla. Growing up in the dangerous city of St. Louis, rising to fame on the television show Wild 'n Out, and taking his music career beyond battle rapping.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: This episode of Future Superstar focuses on punk rock rapper Klondike Blonde. Raised by a single father, Klondike discovered her love for music at a young age. After moving to Atlanta, she shortly rose to fame. This is her story.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: JD is a triple-threat entertainer who rose to fame in commercials and then skyrocketed when he became the voice of Young Simba in the Lion King remake. Raw talent and a genuine passion for his craft make JD a force to be reckoned with.

programme.title: Music Talks: Nas
programme.desc: Music industry titan Andre Harrell sits down with the legendary Nasir Jones (Nas) for an inside look into his journey in the music industry, his philanthropy, and the arts.

programme.title: Johnny Mathis: In Concert
programme.desc: Johnny Mathis is one of a handful of artists who truly deserves a legendary status. Since his impact on scene in the 1950s, Johnny has maintained a high levels of performance, both on recordings and on stage.

programme.title: Whitney Houston: We Will Always Love You
programme.desc: In this film we pay tribute to one of the worlds most loved and best selling music artists of all time. Whitney Elizabeth Houston first showed the vocal range and star quality at the tender age of 11.

programme.title: B.B. King - Life Of Riley
programme.desc: Narrated by Morgan Freeman, this visually stunning film has an contributions by Bono, Eric Clapton, Bruce Willis, Bonnie Raitt, Dr. John and Keith Richards, as well as appearances by Mick Jagger and President Obama.

programme.title: The Story of James Brown
programme.desc: James Brown is one of the founders of funk music and is a major figure of 20th century music and dance. This program features interviews with the man himself, live performances, interviews with band members Bobby Byrd and Maceo Parker Jr.

programme.title: The Story of Jay-Z
programme.desc: Jay-Z is one of the most talented, successful and acclaimed musicians of all time. He changed the game and without him, music - and more specifically hip hop - would not be in the medium it is today.

programme.title: Chuck Berry - The Original King Of Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: CHUCK BERRY' tells the story of the Granddaddy of Rock & Roll. In this highly- anticipated OFFICIAL and Fully-Authorized feature documentary, the absolute instigator of Rock and Roll, Chuck Berry is truly revealed.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you far into the untouched forest to discover an old country home on a cliff, completely hidden by surrounding foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Magnificent jewels in an oval - this Bob Ross painting highlights countless numbers of colors in nature's sky and foliage.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Glide into this scenic world of green trees and bushes reflecting into calm waters. Bob Ross paints both gentle beauty and almighty power.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A perfect oval composition! Come along with Bob Ross and see a secluded cottage with wild daisies and birch trees near a small woodland pond.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Visit this gusty, sandy beach with Bob Ross and see how the approaching menacing clouds hug the great sea and sky ahead.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a spectacular warm winter painting where snow-covered mountains, trees and bushes lend an alluring sense of beauty in an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The effective use of striking blue tones allows Bob Ross to produce a winter night scene, complete with a sweet cabin, inside an oval!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The day's sun is almost gone, but Bob Ross finds what's left of it in this unusual blend of late afternoon tones.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Palm trees sway in the warm breeze as Bob Ross teaches us to paint a beautiful, sunny exotic little ocean masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stand back in the shadows with Bob Ross as the last rays of sunshine sparkle on all they touch in this lovely waterside oval on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the soft coolness of late summer air and drink in the beauty of changing colors with Bob Ross as he creates this refreshing masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross to a secluded waterfall deep in the mountains, standing tall and proud. This magnificent scene instills comfort and joy.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a fantastic and truly unique geometric illusion of depth in today's lovely vision of pastel mountain magic.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Soft misty background, sweet snow-kissed cabin, and rich trees and bushes - all nestled down inside a winter oval painting by Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates an oval scene with warm brown and gold tones that captures the essence of a lonely forest river.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross and experience the amazing beauty of the 'northern lights' phenomenon as they dance across the dark, dark sky - this time in an oval!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Ancient rocks, lapping waves and a serene beach are the perfect setting for a flock of seagulls to hunt for their lunch.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a stroll into the woods with Bob Ross and experience the reflections of a jeweled sun bursting into the soft, vibrant day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Go on a real nature hike with Bob Ross - follow the overgrown path deep in the woods and enjoy the silent beauty of the surrounding stillness.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy another black canvas painting -- Bob Ross creates the deep forest with tall majestic trees, rain puddles, and dark fresh air.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a stroll with Bob Ross, down to that perfect little fishing spot tucked away from the world, and relish the beauty of the day!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch as the sun comes up into the golden sky and creates an illusion of the calm morning sea in this painting by guest artist Audrey Golden.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Nicholas Hankins paints a gnarled old tree adorned with Spanish moss as it stands sentinel over a moonlit stream.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you to a beautiful lake in high country -- catch a glimpse of magnificent mountains, images echoed in the crystal clear water below.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The fall breeze rustles in the trees as you rest your feet in crisp still waters. Discover the joys of nature in this Bob Ross painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Spend a half-hour with Bob Ross as he demonstrates the creation of the perfect brown-toned mountain scene - warm and wonderful!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow guest artist Annette Kowalski as she creates a beautiful hanging clay pot full of leaves and flowers using the Bob Ross painting method.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Sous Vide Prime Rib with Mint Persillade, Popovers; review of vacuum sealers

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Baked Alaska, review of ice cream machines and offset spatulas

programme.title: Julia At Home
programme.desc: Morgan serves up two burgers: a reverse-seared, slow-smoked version, and a cheesy smashed burger.

programme.title: Julia At Home
programme.desc: Morgan creates a nacho table covered in barbecued pork and green chili queso. For dessert: campfire s’mores.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Fish Chowder, Hearty Green Salad with Seared Halloumi; Nakiri knives & tiny tools reviews

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Irish Stew with Carrots and Turnips: Irish Brown Soda Bread; review of all-in-one machines
